scripts.setup: npm run setup:reset && docker compose --profile setup run --rm setup
scripts.build: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run build:local
scripts.lint: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run lint:local
scripts.test: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run test:local
scripts.generate: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run generate:local
scripts.api:generate: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run api:generate:local
scripts.routes:generate: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run routes:generate:local
scripts.db:generate: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run db:generate:local
scripts.db:seed: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run db:seed:local
scripts.cli:query: docker compose --profile tools run --rm app npm run cli:query:local
scripts.build:local: npm run build -w @pb138/client && npm run build -w @pb138/server
scripts.lint:local: npm run lint -w @pb138/client && npm run lint -w @pb138/server && eslint scripts
scripts.generate:local: npm run api:generate:local && npm run routes:generate:local
